requirement_topic.en: CE-Aligned Electrical Safety and BESS Battery Standards
requirement_topic.zh: CE对应电气安全与BESS电池标准
requirement_topic.zht: CE對應電氣安全與BESS電池標準

summary.en: For in-scope BESS equipment, Moldova aligns with CE-oriented safety baselines for electrical equipment through EU-adjacent pathways. For lithium systems, evidence commonly aligns to TS EN IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 series documents, with final applicability determined by ANRE guidance, contract terms, and project owner requirements rather than a single blanket national certificate.
summary.zh: 对适用范围内的BESS设备，摩尔多瓦通过欧盟接轨路径对电气设备采取CE导向安全基线。对锂电系统而言，常用证据可与TS EN IEC 62619和IEC 62933系列文件对齐，最终适用性由ANRE指引、合同条款和项目业主要求决定，而非单一全国性证书。
summary.zht: 對適用範圍內之BESS設備，摩爾多瓦透過歐盟接軌路徑對電氣設備採取CE導向安全基線。對鋰電系統而言，常用證據可與TS EN IEC 62619和IEC 62933系列文件對齊，最終適用性由ANRE指引、合約條款及專案業主要求決定，而非單一全國性證書。

standards_or_laws: Low-voltage product safety models applied through CE-oriented pathways in Moldova

summary.en: China commonly uses GB 44240-2024 for lithium cell safety, GB/T 36276-2023 for storage batteries, and GB/T 36558 for systems. These are useful technical reference points but are not full substitutes for Moldova project-level conformity evidence.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用GB 44240-2024作为锂电芯安全依据，GB/T 36276-2023用于储能锂电池，GB/T 36558用于储能系统。它们可作技术参考，但不能取代摩尔多瓦项目级合规证明。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用GB 44240-2024作為鋰電芯安全依據，GB/T 36276-2023用於儲能鋰電池，GB/T 36558用於儲能系統。它們可作為技術參考，但不能取代摩爾多瓦專案級合規證明。

gap.en: A China-only BESS dossier should be converted to a Moldova-ready package by mapping voltage scope, mandatory standard applicability, test evidence, component and installation certificates, thermal and fault behavior evidence, risk analysis, and documentation language to project authorities and grid entities.
gap.zh: 面向摩尔多瓦的文件应将中国单一电池安全材料重构为摩尔多瓦就绪包，包括电压范围、强制性标准适用性、测试证据、部件及安装证书、热行为和故障行为证据、风险分析和针对项目监管方与电网实体的文件语言映射。
gap.zht: 面向摩爾多瓦的文件應將中國單一電池安全材料重構為摩爾多瓦就緒包，包括電壓範圍、強制性標準適用性、測試證據、部件及安裝證書、熱行為與故障行為證據、風險分析和針對專案監管方與電網實體的文件語言對映。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope electrical equipment when Moldova market-facing requirements are applied through ANRE or project compliance routes; often required where insurance, public procurement, or transmission interface is involved
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — Chinese GB battery safety documents are useful evidence but not direct Moldova-market substitutions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare a Moldova technical file with explicit ANRE-relevant scope statements and language versions; avoid presenting GB 44240 or GB/T 36276 evidence as full market-conformity proof.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应准备含有ANRE适用范围说明和语言版本的摩尔多瓦技术文件，不应将GB 44240或GB/T 36276证据直接当作市场合规完整证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應準備含ANRE適用範圍說明與語言版本的摩爾多瓦技術文件，不應將GB 44240或GB/T 36276證據直接視為市場合規完整證明。
